research project "Belgian Turks: Bridge Breach between Turkey European Union?"
conducted Ayhan Kaya Ferhat Kentel published King Baudouin, focuses lives Turks living Belgium.

research aims reveal political culture Euro-Turks well make comparison contemporary French German models incorporation integration vis-à-vis migrants.
this framework, project produced demographic Euro-Turks countries; Germany France, explore Euro-Turks' perspectives Europeans, well Euro-Turks' political, social, cultural economic orientations towards Germany/France Turkey.

this respect, in-depth interviews focus group discussions with intellectuals, politicians, artists opinion leaders were conducted Germany France.
